name: workflow-build-implement-and-guard
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>implement>verify>review>audit | scope: diff|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,correctness-first,quality-gates{tests,security},deterministic-output | lens: hickey-carmack | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: CHANGE_GOAL
required_inputs.description: Core behavior or structure to change.

required_inputs.name: IMPLEMENTATION_MODE
required_inputs.description: Implementation mode. Defaults to the narrowest mode implied by the change goal.

required_inputs.name: TASK_IDS
required_inputs.description: Task ids to implement or synthesized adhoc ids when no task ledger exists.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_BEHAVIORS
required_inputs.description: Behaviors that the guard tests must protect.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Safety, rollout, compatibility, or non-goal constraints.
